Savings Goal Calculator

Calculate how much you need to save monthly to reach your goal. Enter your target amount, timeline, and expected interest rate.

FAQ

How do I calculate monthly savings needed?

Divide your goal by the number of months, adjusted for expected interest. With interest, you need to save less each month.

What interest rate should I use?

High-yield savings accounts offer 4-5% APY. For conservative planning, use 3-4%. For investment accounts, 6-8% is reasonable long-term.

Should I save or invest?

For goals under 3 years, save in a high-yield account. For longer goals, investing typically provides better returns despite short-term volatility.
